description:
You are a security engineer who has just received a freshly generated API credential that must replace an expiring one in two small configuration files.  
  
Initial system layout (already present when the session starts):  
1. Directory: **/home/user/security/**  
2. File: **/home/user/security/config.yaml** containing exactly  
```
api:
  token: oldtoken123
  url: https://internal.example.com/api
```  
3. File: **/home/user/security/settings.toml** containing exactly  
```
[api]
token = "oldtoken123"
url   = "https://internal.example.com/api"
```  

Incoming requirement  
• The new credential string is: **newtokenXYZ890** (do not add quotes to the YAML value; preserve quotes in the TOML value).  
• After rotation, a one-line log entry must be written to **/home/user/security/rotation.log**.  
  The line MUST be exactly (including the space between the timestamp and the word “Rotated”):  
```
2024-04-15T00:00:00Z Rotated credential from oldtoken123 to newtokenXYZ890
```  

Acceptance criteria that the automated grader will verify:  
A. /home/user/security/config.yaml must end up as  
```
api:
  token: newtokenXYZ890
  url: https://internal.example.com/api
```  

B. /home/user/security/settings.toml must end up as  
```
[api]
token = "newtokenXYZ890"
url   = "https://internal.example.com/api"
```  

C. /home/user/security/rotation.log must exist and contain one and only one line, identical to the line shown above (newline at the end of the line is acceptable).  

D. No other files should be altered or created inside /home/user/security/.  

Your entire solution should fit in a single terminal command (use pipes, redirection, subshells, etc. as you see fit).  
After running that command, you may run auxiliary commands (e.g., cat) to show the resulting file contents, but the actual edit operation must be accomplished with just one compound shell command.
truth:
Initial files provided to the container before the task starts:

Path: /home/user/security/config.yaml  
Contents:
api:
  token: oldtoken123
  url: https://internal.example.com/api

Path: /home/user/security/settings.toml  
Contents:
[api]
token = "oldtoken123"
url   = "https://internal.example.com/api"

Path: /home/user/security/rotation.log  
Does not exist at start.

After the agent finishes successfully:

/home/user/security/config.yaml  
api:
  token: newtokenXYZ890
  url: https://internal.example.com/api

/home/user/security/settings.toml  
[api]
token = "newtokenXYZ890"
url   = "https://internal.example.com/api"

/home/user/security/rotation.log  
2024-04-15T00:00:00Z Rotated credential from oldtoken123 to newtokenXYZ890
name: task_000000_685e41fc
